title: BTS REUNITES! a personal musical journey of self-discovery and	in a postapocalyp...
content:
BTS REUNITES! a personal musical journey of self-discovery and	in a postapocalyptic world. V showed his silly side

△ From left: Suga attended Paris Fashion Week in January 2023; V threw out the first pitch at a Los Angeles Dodgers game in 2025; Jin at a 2025 press conference for Netflix’sKian’s Bizarre B&B; theArirangalbum cover.

The K-pop stars—from left, RM, J-Hope, Suga (hidden in rear), Jung Kook, Jin (rear), Jimin, and V—raised the roof at the KIIS FM Jingle Ball 2019 in Los Angeles.

BTS shut down Manhattan’s majestic rail terminal at 2 a.m. to tape a performance forThe Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon on February 24, 2020.

The BTS boys brought their message of self-acceptance to a youth conference at United Nations headquarters in New York City in 2018. “Today I am who I am, with all of my faults and my mistakes,” said the band’s leader, RM (center).

Singer-songwriter Halsey had Jung Kook’s back during a performance of the band’s hit single “Boy with Luv” at the 2019 Music Awards in Las Vegas. Billboard

The boys posed for a classic tourist snapshot when they visited the lobby of the Empire State Building on May 21, 2019.

J-Hope snapped a selfie with his bandmates and Ellen DeGeneres during BTS’s appearance on her talk show on May 25, 2018.

Back when they were still known to local fans as the Bangtan Boys—short for Bangtan Sonyeondan (translation: Bulletproof Boy Scouts)—the band stormed Seoul’s Uniqlo- AX Hall on September 25, 2013.

The official leader of the band, RM—formerly known as Rap Monster—has written the lyrics and had a hand in the composition and production of many of BTS’s biggest hits. He was the first of the boys scouted by BTS founder Bang Si-hyuk in 2010, when he was a freshman in high school and a battle rapper on Seoul’s underground music scene. Faced with criticism for joining a mainstream idol band, the versatile performer snapped back onRM, his 2015 solo mixtape, “I’m not pop, I’m not rock, I’m not funk, I’m not R&B or hip-hop.” Known for his fast- paced flow, RM has collaborated with artists such as Wale, Warren G, and Fall Out Boy. The only member of BTS who speaks fluent English, he famously taught himself by watching all 10 seasons of the U.S. sitcomFriends; he also briefly studied in New Zealand. A compassionate advocate for youth and a peacemaker within the band, RM told the UN General Assembly in a speech in New York City, “No matter who you are, where you’re from, your skin color, gender identity: just speak yourself.”
